Text.value: The event 8DFE(HEX) occurs when 240 is written to index 2. This event is deleted when 241 is written to the same index.
The event 8DFF(HEX) occurs when 242 is written to index 2. This event is deleted when 243 is written to the same index.
A time error occurred. Reset the time.
The frequency of the pulse output (Ch.1) has exceeded 500 Hz.
The frequency of the pulse output (Ch.2) has exceeded 500 Hz.
Cannot communicate with the Ethernet Module MP-FEN1. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 0. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 1. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 2. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 3. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 4. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 5. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 6. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 7. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 8. Check the connection.
Cannot communicate with the Energy Monitor 9. Check the connection.
The instantaneous flow is outside the measurable range.
The pressure is outside the measurable range.
The temperature is outside the measurable range.
Leakage is increasing. Please implement countermeasure against leakage.
The shut-off valve has not been closed for a long period of time. Revise the Valve Close Threshold.
The valve override lever is set to Manual Open or the shut-off valve is damaged.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 0 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 1 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 2 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 3 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 4 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 5 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 6 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 7 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 8 is outside the measurable range.
The value measured by the Energy Monitor 9 is outside the measurable range.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 0 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 1 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 2 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 3 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 4 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 5 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 6 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 7 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 8 has been wired incorrectly.
The measurement voltage or the CT for Energy Monitor 9 has been wired incorrectly.
The stand-by electric power is increasing.
The Energy Monitor is connected but not configured. Please configure.

The parameter of the technology-specific application are set to default values. Identification parameter remain unchanged. An upload to the data storage of the master will be executed, if activated in the port configuration of the master.
The parameter of the device are set to factory default values and communication will be inhibited until the next power cycle. Note: Directly detach the device from the master port!
